compiled_state.title: As a platform engineer, I can configure Jira, Figma, and Confluence integrations using a dedicated Integration Setup section in INSTALL.md
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: An Integration Setup section added to root INSTALL.md, with subsections for Jira, Figma, and Confluence (placeholder), each linking to the relevant external guide for obtaining API credentials.
**Why**: Platform engineers who want DSO's optional integrations need to know what credentials to obtain and where to get them. Without this section, integration configuration requires trial and error.
**Scope**:
- IN: Add Integration Setup section to root INSTALL.md (additive edit -- must not overwrite existing content from Story C); Jira subsection (API token + user email + base URL + Atlassian guide link); Figma subsection (PAT + Figma guide link); Confluence subsection (placeholder only -- not yet implemented)
- OUT: Implementing any integrations; documenting integration config keys (Story E); creating the INSTALL.md file (Story C)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, INSTALL.md contains an Integration Setup section with: (a) a Jira subsection listing the required API token, user email, and Jira base URL with a link to the Atlassian API token guide; (b) a Figma subsection listing the required personal access token with a link to the Figma personal access token guide; (c) a Confluence subsection containing a single placeholder sentence stating the integration is planned with no actionable steps
  <- Satisfies: SC5 (Integration Setup section with Jira, Figma, Confluence subsections)
- When this story is complete, all content from Story C (marketplace install steps, dependency lists, prerequisites, /dso:onboarding section) is preserved intact in INSTALL.md
  <- Satisfies: adversarial review finding -- additive edit must not overwrite Story C content

## Considerations

- [Integration] Verified: Jira API token guide URL: https://support.atlassian.com/atlassian-account/docs/manage-api-tokens-for-your-atlassian-account/
- [Integration] Verified: Figma personal access token guide URL: https://help.figma.com/hc/en-us/articles/8085703771159-Manage-personal-access-tokens
- [Integration] Confluence integration is not yet implemented in the codebase; the subsection must make this explicit with a single placeholder sentence

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue -- one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Story complete: all children closed, completion-verifier PASS on all done definitions.
comments.author: Test
